auth.whatsappSubtitle: We'll send a 6-digit code to your WhatsApp
auth.phoneVerifySubtitle: Enter your phone number to keep your account secure
auth.phoneSmsNote: We'll send a verification code via SMS
auth.errorInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.sidebarDescription: The entire web agency pipeline — automated by AI. Listen. Build. Ship.
auth.mfaTotpSubtitle: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code for Yappaflow.
auth.mfaBackupToggle: Can't access your authenticator? Use a backup code
auth.mfaBackupSubtitle: Paste one of the single-use recovery codes you saved when you enabled MFA.

hero.headline: From Conversation to Code.
hero.description: Yappaflow listens to your client conversations, generates production-ready code in real-time, and deploys autonomously. The entire web agency pipeline — automated by AI.

features.listenDesc: Connect WhatsApp, Instagram, or join a voice call. Yappaflow's AI listens, transcribes, and extracts project requirements in real-time. No briefs, no back-and-forth.
features.buildDesc: Claude processes your client's vision into production-ready code. Full-stack applications, CMS configurations, or custom builds — generated in minutes, not weeks.
features.shipDesc: Deploy to Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, IKAS, or custom hosting. Yappaflow handles domain purchasing, DNS configuration, and server provisioning automatically.

detail.headline: Connect Once. Deploy Everywhere.
detail.description: Integrate your favorite platforms and let Yappaflow handle the rest. From client intake to live deployment, every step is automated.

showcase.headline: What Effortless Agency Work Looks Like
showcase.card1Desc: Every client message is analyzed for project scope, budget signals, and timeline expectations before your team even reads it.
showcase.card2Desc: Your compliance policies and coding standards are built into every generation. All code follows your agency's standards automatically.
showcase.card3Desc: AI generates and validates. Yappaflow checks every generated component against your standards before it goes out. The AI writes fast; Yappaflow keeps it compliant.

demo.headline: See It Work
demo.description: Watch Yappaflow capture a client call, generate a full e-commerce store, and deploy it to Shopify — all in under 10 minutes.

integrations.headline: Every Platform. Every Channel. Automated.
integrations.description: Your whole agency communicates with confidence. Issues get fixed at the source. Automation focuses on what matters.
integrations.shopifyDesc: Deploy full storefronts with themes and products.
integrations.wordpressDesc: Generate themes, plugins, and complete sites.
integrations.webflowDesc: Create responsive Webflow projects via API.
integrations.hostingerDesc: Provision servers and deploy custom builds.

integrationsSection.headline: An AI-powered agency platform
integrationsSection.description: Yappaflow connects every channel, CMS, and host you already use. We read the conversation, write the code, and ship the site — so your team spends their time on strategy, not boilerplate.
integrationsSection.bigCopyLead: We are an AI-powered agency platform. Not just automation, not isolated tools. We provide
integrationsSection.bigCopyBold1: client listening, code generation, multi-platform deployment
integrationsSection.bigCopyMid2: as one connected approach. An end-to-end ecosystem designed to
integrationsSection.rightCopy1Lead: Yappaflow connects to your existing tools silently. It listens to client conversations on WhatsApp and Instagram, extracts requirements in real-time, generates production-ready code, and deploys to your preferred platform. We don't add complexity.
integrationsSection.rightCopy2Lead: Your conversations become code, your meetings become live products.

manifesto.line1: We started Yappaflow because we were tired of watching brilliant agencies drown in busywork.
manifesto.line2: Tired of conversations lost between WhatsApp and email.
manifesto.line3: Tired of the same boilerplate. Again and again.
manifesto.line4: Tired of deploys that take days instead of seconds.
manifesto.line6: An AI that listens to your clients.
manifesto.line8: Ships to any platform with one click.
manifesto.meta: Platform: Shopify · Region: EU-West · Build: 34 components

dashboardJourney.chat1Text: I need a modern e-commerce store for my fashion brand
dashboardJourney.chat2Text: Sure, what platforms do you prefer?
dashboardJourney.chat3Text: Shopify would be great. Turkish lira payments, dark mode, mobile first
dashboardJourney.chat4Text: And I need it launched by next Friday
dashboardJourney.chat5Text: Got it. Let me get this started for you right away

api.headline: Build on Yappaflow Infrastructure
api.description: Add AI-powered code generation to any agent, copilot, or internal tool with one API. Every piece of content validated against your agency standards before it reaches users.

trust.headline: Enterprise-Grade Security
trust.description: Built for agencies where the stakes are high. Your client data is encrypted, isolated, and never used for model training.

cta.headline: See Yappaflow On Your Projects
cta.description: Run your real client projects through Yappaflow. Watch builds get generated and deployed at the source. See your team finally unblocked.
cta.testimonial: "Our team moves faster because they know exactly what's being built. And our development team finally focuses on real work, not chasing down requirements."

ctaSection.description: Join agencies already shipping faster with Yappaflow. Connect your channels, generate code from conversations, and deploy in minutes — not weeks.
ctaSection.trust: No credit card required · Free for 14 days · Cancel anytime

pricing.subhead: Start free for 14 days. No credit card required. Scale as your agency grows.
pricing.faqA1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.
pricing.faqQ2: What happens after the free trial?
pricing.faqA2: After 14 days, you'll be asked to choose a plan. No charge during the trial. Cancel anytime.
pricing.faqA3: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. No questions asked.
pricing.faqA4: No setup fees, no hidden costs. The price you see is the price you pay.
pricing.bottomCta: No credit card required · Free for 14 days · Cancel anytime

privacy.s1Intro: When you use Yappaflow, we collect the following information:
privacy.s1Item1Body: Phone number, name, and email address provided during registration.
privacy.s1Item2Body: WhatsApp and Instagram messages, contact names, and conversation metadata that you authorize us to access through Meta's APIs.
privacy.s1Item3Body: Pages viewed, features used, and interactions within the dashboard.
privacy.s1Item4Body: Browser type, IP address, and device identifiers for security and analytics.
privacy.s2Item1: To provide and maintain the Yappaflow platform and its features.
privacy.s2Item2: To display your WhatsApp and Instagram messages in your dashboard.
privacy.s2Item3: To send messages on your behalf through connected platforms.
privacy.s2Item4: To improve our services and develop new features.
privacy.s2Item5: To communicate with you about your account and service updates.
privacy.s3Body: Yappaflow accesses your WhatsApp and Instagram data only with the permissions you grant during login. We use Meta's official APIs (WhatsApp Cloud API and Instagram Graph API) to retrieve and send messages. We do not sell, share, or use your Meta platform data for advertising purposes. You can revoke access at any time from Settings → Platforms.
privacy.s4Body: Your data is stored on encrypted servers hosted by trusted cloud providers. We use industry-standard security measures including TLS encryption in transit, encrypted databases at rest, and access controls to protect your information. We retain your data only as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services.
privacy.s5Intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data only in the following cases:
privacy.s5Item1: With service providers who help us operate the platform (hosting, analytics).
privacy.s5Item2: When required by law or to protect our legal rights.
privacy.s6Item1: Access and download your personal data.
privacy.s6Item3: Request deletion of your account and associated data.
privacy.s6Item4: Disconnect platform integrations at any time.
privacy.s7BodyLead: You can request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us at
privacy.s7BodyTail: . Upon request, we will delete your account and all associated data within 30 days, unless retention is required by law.
privacy.s8Body: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and authentication state. We do not use third-party advertising cookies. Analytics cookies are used only to improve the platform experience and can be disabled in your browser settings.
privacy.s9Body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or an in-app notification. Continued use of Yappaflow after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s10BodyLead: If you have questions about this privacy policy or your data, contact us at:

terms.s1Body: By accessing or using Yappaflow ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the Service. These terms apply to all users, including agencies, team members, and visitors.
terms.s2Body: Yappaflow is a platform that helps digital agencies manage client communications across WhatsApp and Instagram, generate websites using AI, and deploy projects. The Service integrates with third-party platforms including Meta (WhatsApp and Instagram) via their official APIs.
terms.s3Item1: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
terms.s3Item2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.
terms.s3Item3: You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service.
terms.s3Item4: One person or entity may not maintain more than one account.
terms.s3Item5: You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.
terms.s4Item1: Use the Service for spam, unsolicited messaging, or any form of abuse.
terms.s4Item2: Violate any applicable laws or regulations, including data protection laws.
terms.s4Item3: Send messages that violate Meta's Platform Terms or WhatsApp Business Policy.
terms.s4Item4: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service or its related systems.
terms.s4Item5: Use the Service to collect, store, or process sensitive personal data without proper consent.
terms.s4Item6: Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the Service.
terms.s5Body: The Service integrates with Meta platforms (WhatsApp and Instagram). Your use of these integrations is subject to Meta's terms and policies. Yappaflow is not responsible for changes to third-party APIs, service interruptions, or policy changes by Meta or other integrated platforms. We will make reasonable efforts to maintain integrations but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access.
terms.s6Body: The Service, including its design, code, and branding, is owned by Yappaflow and protected by intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of your content (messages, projects, assets) uploaded to or created through the Service. By using the Service, you grant us a limited license to process your content solely to provide the Service.
terms.s7Item1: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually as selected during signup.
terms.s7Item2: All fees are non-refundable except as described in our 30-day money-back guarantee.
terms.s7Item3: We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice.
terms.s7Item4: Failure to pay may result in suspension or termination of your account.
terms.s8Body: You may terminate your account at any time from your account settings. We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms, fail to pay fees, or engage in activity that harms other users or the Service. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately. We will retain your data for 30 days after termination, after which it will be permanently deleted.
terms.s9Body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Yappaflow shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or related to your use of the Service. Our total liability for any claims arising from these terms shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months prior to the claim.
terms.s10Body: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure. We do not warrant the accuracy or completeness of any information provided through the Service.
terms.s11Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or in-app notification at least 15 days before they take effect. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.s12BodyLead: For questions about these terms, contact us at:

deploy.title: Deploy Hub
deploy.pickSignalDesc: We'll read the conversation to pull out the business name, tone, and a few domain ideas.
deploy.domainDesc: Your website is already building. You can buy a domain now, or skip and grab one later.
deploy.buildIdle: Build will start when you click 'Buy on Namecheap'
deploy.buildSubtitle: We're generating your website in the background — this usually takes a minute or two.
deploy.confirmPurchaseDesc: Tell us which domain so we can pair it with the site.
deploy.skipDomainCta: Skip — just give me the website
deploy.downloadDesc: Your site is packaged as a ZIP — upload it to any host.
deploy.noDomainDesc: That's fine — download the site now and point any domain at it whenever you're ready.
deploy.hostDesc: Upload the ZIP to any static host. Hostinger is the one we recommend.
deploy.signalPickerEmptyDesc: Import a WhatsApp or Instagram chat first — we use it to extract the client's business identity.
deploy.shopifyPickSignalDesc: The messages will be analyzed to extract the business identity and products for your Shopify store.
deploy.shopifyAnalyzing: Analyzing the chat for business identity…
deploy.shopifyBuildDesc: A complete Liquid theme + Shopify-compatible products.csv will be built for you.
deploy.shopifyPushedBody: Theme uploaded ({themeFiles} files) and {productsCreated} products created on {shopDomain}.
deploy.shopifyConnectDesc: Authorize Yappaflow once, and we'll upload the theme + products straight to your store.
deploy.manualShopifyDesc: Download the ZIP and upload it yourself (Online Store → Themes → Upload zip file).
deploy.wpPickSignalDesc: The messages will be analyzed to extract the business identity, pages, and products for your WordPress site.
deploy.wpBuildDesc: A full classic + block-editor theme, editor-ready page bodies, and a WooCommerce products CSV are being built.
deploy.wpThemeUploadHint: The theme still needs to be uploaded manually — download the ZIP below and upload wordpress-theme.zip at Appearance → Themes → Add New → Upload Theme.
deploy.wpWooDetected: WooCommerce detected — products will push directly.
deploy.wpConnectDesc: Authorize Yappaflow once, and we'll push your pages + products directly via the REST API.
deploy.wpAppPasswordPlaceholder: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx
deploy.wpAppPasswordHint: Generate one in your WP admin under Users → Profile → Application Passwords. Yappaflow stores it encrypted.
deploy.wpDotcomSiteUrlLabel: Site URL (optional — WP.com will pick your primary blog)
deploy.wpMissingFields: Site URL, username, and application password are all required
deploy.wpManualDesc: Download the ZIP and upload wordpress-theme.zip inside it at Appearance → Themes → Add New → Upload Theme.
deploy.shopifyManualDesc: Download the ZIP and upload it yourself (Online Store → Themes → Upload zip file).

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Review, edit, or add products before we generate the theme.
products.emptyHint: No products yet. Add one manually to include them in the generated site.
products.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: One-sentence product description — what it is, who it's for.
products.fieldImagesHelp: One URL per line, or comma-separated. Up to 12 images.
products.variantsEmpty: No variants. Single-SKU products don't need this.

commandCenter.serverOfflineHint: Start the server with {cmd} in the {pkg} package
commandCenter.importBannerDesc: Export chats from WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, or any messaging app and upload them here. All messages are encrypted at rest.
commandCenter.whatsappLiveDesc: Waiting for customers to message your WhatsApp Business number
commandCenter.noConversationsDesc: Import chat exports from WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, or any messaging app
commandCenter.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to track it here
commandCenter.addProjectNameClientRequired: Name and client name are required
commandCenter.startConvSubtitle: Pick a contact or enter a number
commandCenter.startConvNoCustomersDesc: Customers appear here as they message your WhatsApp Business number
commandCenter.startConvManualAddDesc: Enter name and number below to add a new contact
commandCenter.startConvDefaultMessage: Hi! I wanted to reach out about our services. Are you available for a quick chat?
commandCenter.startConvWindowNote: The recipient must have messaged your business in the last 24 hours, or you must use an approved WhatsApp template message.

engineRoom.emptyDesc: Click a signal on the dashboard to open its chat thread
engineRoom.consentBody: These messages are fetched from your connected WhatsApp / Instagram account. You authorized Yappaflow to access them during login.
engineRoom.loadError: Could not load messages — server offline
engineRoom.emptyMessagesDesc: Messages will appear here when {name} writes to you
engineRoom.whatsappRequiresToken: Requires WhatsApp Business API token in Settings → Platforms

chatImport.title: Import Conversations
chatImport.description: Export your chats from WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, or any messaging app, then drop the file below. All messages are encrypted at rest.
chatImport.dropzoneTitle: Drop your chat export here, or browse
chatImport.notInChatHint: Keep each person as a separate conversation
chatImport.outboundNote: Your messages will appear as outbound; other participants become separate conversations.
chatImport.pickSideHint: Pick which side is you to continue
chatImport.whatsappHow: Open a chat → ⋮ → More → Export chat → Without media → Save .txt
chatImport.instagramHow: Settings → Your activity → Download your information → Messages
chatImport.telegramHow: Settings → Advanced → Export Telegram data → Personal chats → JSON
chatImport.csvHow: Any CSV or JSON with columns like sender, text, timestamp works.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: AI-powered tools to grow your agency beyond website building
solutions.emailAiTip: Let AI craft email sequences from your client conversations — welcome flows, product launches, and re-engagement campaigns tailored to each audience.
solutions.socialPost2Content: Behind the scenes: building our e-commerce dashboard
solutions.socialPost3Content: How AI is transforming digital agency workflows

integrationsSettings.pageSubtitle: Manage your agency preferences and integrations
integrationsSettings.liveIntegrationsDesc: Optionally connect Instagram to receive DMs in real-time.
integrationsSettings.igOauthDesc: Connect your Instagram Business account in one click. You'll be redirected to Meta to authorize Yappaflow to read your DMs.
integrationsSettings.igDmsDesc: Connect to receive real-time customer messages
integrationsSettings.whatsappHistoryNote: WhatsApp message history is not available via the API — new messages will appear here in real-time as customers write to you.

securitySettings.pageSubtitle: Protect your account with multi-factor authentication.
securitySettings.mfaNotEnabled: Not enabled — your account is protected only by your password.
securitySettings.mfaEnableBlurb: Use an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, Microsoft Authenticator) to generate a rotating 6-digit code that's required at every login. You'll also get 10 single-use backup codes in case you lose your phone.
securitySettings.mfaEnrollStep1: Open your authenticator app and add a new account.
securitySettings.mfaEnrollStep2: Scan the QR code below, or paste the secret manually.
securitySettings.mfaEnrollStep3: Enter the 6-digit code the app generates.
securitySettings.mfaRegenerateDesc: Invalidates your current codes and issues 10 new ones.
securitySettings.mfaDisableDesc: Removes the second factor from your account.
securitySettings.mfaConfirmDisableBody: Enter a current 6-digit code from your authenticator to confirm disabling MFA.
securitySettings.mfaConfirmRegenerateBody: Enter a current 6-digit code from your authenticator to generate fresh backup codes. Your existing codes will stop working.
securitySettings.mfaSaveCodesBody: These backup codes will not be shown again. Store them somewhere safe — a password manager is ideal. Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator.
securitySettings.backupFileWarning: Each code can be used ONCE. Store them somewhere safe — anyone with a code can bypass your authenticator app.

dashboardShell.consentBody: Yappaflow accesses your WhatsApp and Instagram messages only with the permissions you granted during login. You can revoke access anytime in
